entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Hazme una pregunta que me ayude a empezar."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "No des todavía la respuesta final. Pregúntame cuál creo que es el primer paso."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Explica por qué funciona este paso."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Dame una pista, no la respuesta final."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Dame un problema parecido después de resolver este."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Aquí está mi respuesta. ¿Qué idea errónea muestra?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Aquí está mi intento. ¿Cuál es la pista más pequeña que ayudaría?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Crea un problema de práctica parecido después de este."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Haz que te explique la idea antes de continuar."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "Hazme un cuestionario sobre este tema y espera mi respuesta."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "¿Qué idea errónea llevaría a alguien a mi respuesta incorrecta?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: Una prueba sencilla

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: A strong estudio loop looks like this:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: La IA puede ayudarte a aprender más rápido. También puede ayudarte a evitar aprender por completo.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: IA tutor

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Pide una pista. No pidas todavía la respuesta final.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Pide una pequeña pista.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Pide a la IA que compruebe ese paso.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: Al final de una sesión de estudio, hazte tres preguntas:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Inténtalo primero. Dedica tres minutos a probar sin IA.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Evita la trampa de copiar

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Construye un ciclo

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: ¿Puedo hacer un ejemplo nuevo?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: ¿Puedo explicar la idea sin mirar?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Distintas tareas de aprendizaje necesitan distintos flujos. Usa un coach de deberes para pistas, un coach de pasos matemáticos para resolver problemas, un tutor socrático para comprensión profunda, tarjetas para recordar y cuestionarios para practicar bajo presión.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: ¿Sé qué practicar después?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Explica tu movimiento. Dile a la IA por qué elegiste el siguiente paso.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Corrige la idea equivocada.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Para escritura, eso significa usar Writing Coach para mejorar una tesis, estructura o párrafo manteniendo tu voz. Para código, significa usar Code Tutor para explicar errores, pedirte que predigas la salida y ayudarte a depurar en lugar de pegar una solución completa. Para exámenes, significa usar Planificador de preparación de exámenes para decidir qué repasar primero y cómo evaluarte.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: Buenos indicaciones para estudiar con honestidad

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Aquí tienes una versión un poco más sólida que puedes reutilizar:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Cómo estudiar con IA sin engañarte a ti mismo

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Si la respuesta es sí, la IA te ayudó a estudiar. Si la respuesta es no, el siguiente paso no es leer más. Es práctica activa. Abre Aprende cualquier cosa, Instrucción socrática o la biblioteca de indicaciones de aprendizaje con IA y convierte el tema en una tarea que debas intentar.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Si el trabajo es una tarea escolar, empieza en Entrenador de tareas. Si es matemáticas, usa Entrenador de pasos de matemáticas y pídele que compruebe un paso a la vez. Si intentas entender profundamente un concepto, usa Instrucción socrática y responde las preguntas antes de pedir un resumen.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Si pegas una pregunta de tarea y copias la respuesta final, quizá termines la tarea, pero no habrás desarrollado la habilidad. Si pides una pista, explicas tu razonamiento, comparas tu respuesta e intentas un problema similar, la IA se convierte en compañera de estudio en lugar de atajo.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Práctica a new version.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Práctica transfer. Pregunta para a similar problem con different numbers, wording, o context.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Recall later. Turn el punto débil en a card en Creador de tarjetas de estudio o a short quiz en Hazme un cuestionario de cultura general.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. Pregunta qué your respuesta mostrars about your comprensión.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: habilidades de estudio

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Estudiar con IA funciona mejor cuando la herramienta te mantiene al mando.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Eso is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not el same as being able to solve a new problem, escribir a paragraph, or respuesta a pregunta under pressure.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Eso loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confusard.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. IA explicars something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you puedenot reproduce el idea sin el respuesta in front of you.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: difference is how you usar it.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: pregunta is not whether IA debe be part of estudioing. For many estudiantes it alleery is. better pregunta is whether el tool is ayudaring you construir memoria, judgment, and confianza, or quietly removing el exact struggle eso hacers aprendizaje stick.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: transfer step is el key. If you puede only solve el exact problem el IA just walked mediante, you have learned el example. If you puede solve a cousin of el problem, you are empezaring to learn el idea.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Estos are not magic words. Ellos are guardrails. Ellos mantener el conversación focusard on thinking en lugar de respuesta collection.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Estos indicaciones mantener you active. Ellos hacer el IA apoyar your razonaring en vez de replace it.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Prueba indicaciones como estos:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Intenta resolver el problema por tu cuenta.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Usa la IA como coach para comprender, practicar y recibir feedback, no como un atajo que elimina silenciosamente el aprendizaje.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Usa la IA para el razonamiento alrededor de la respuesta

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Usa indicaciones that make the IA slow down:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Usa the right modo

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Usa this rule: después de any IA explanation, close the loop con output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask para a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Escribe your next step.
